title: Alaska
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Alaska

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Alaska

You can apply for Medicaid in Alaska by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Alaska

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Alaska

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Alaska

CHIP in Alaska

Denali KidCare covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Denali KidCare right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Denali KidCare in Alaska.
